name: Porcupine Peppers
recipeIngredient: 2 cups uncooked instant or boil-in-bag rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Lightly coat a 9 x 9-inch glass baking dish with cooking spray, or use an uncoated, non-stick metal baking dish.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine ground beef, diced tomatoes, rice, paprika, celery salt, and Worcestershire sauce. Mix with a large spoon until well blended; set aside.
4. Cut peppers from top to bottom into 4 or 5 large strips. Place half of the peppers on the bottom of the baking dish. Spoon half of the meat mixture evenly over peppers. Repeat with remaining peppers and meat mixture.
5. Cover and bake for 45 minutes.
